query_title: How to Be a Latin Lover

recommendations.title: Struck by Lightning
recommendations.overview: After being struck and killed by lightning, a young man recounts the way he blackmailed his fellow classmates into contributing to his literary magazine.

recommendations.title: Dog Days
recommendations.overview: Elizabeth, a charming morning show news anchor, seeks advice from her dog's therapist after a breakup. Tara, a spunky barista, dreams of a life beyond the coffee shop. Awkward Garrett pines for Tara while trying to keep his adopt-a-dog business afloa

recommendations.title: In a World...
recommendations.overview: An underachieving vocal coach is motivated by her father, the king of movie-trailer voice-overs, to pursue her aspirations of becoming a voice-over star. Amidst pride, sexism and family dysfunction, she sets out to change the voice of a generation.

recommendations.title: Gattaca
recommendations.overview: Vincent is an all-too-human man who dares to defy a system obsessed with genetic perfection. He is an "In-Valid" who assumes the identity of a member of the genetic elite to pursue his goal of traveling into space with the Gattaca Aerospace Corporati

recommendations.title: Diary of a Lost Girl
recommendations.overview: Thymian Henning, an innocent young girl, is raped by the clerk of her father's pharmacy. She becomes pregnant, is rejected by her family, and must fend for herself in a harsh, cruel world.

recommendations.title: Toy Story of Terror!
recommendations.overview: What starts out as a fun road trip for the Toy Story gang takes an unexpected turn for the worse when the trip detours to a roadside motel. After one of the toys goes missing, the others find themselves caught up in a mysterious sequence of events th

recommendations.title: Nostalgic Christmas
recommendations.overview: When Anne helps her father close the family's toy store, what she finds will help inspire an entire town that is need of some Christmas cheer.

recommendations.title: Bananas
recommendations.overview: When a bumbling New Yorker is dumped by his activist girlfriend, he travels to a tiny Latin American nation and becomes involved in its latest rebellion.

recommendations.title: Women on the Verge of a Nervous Breakdown
recommendations.overview: After being dumped by her lover, Pepa finds her life and the lives of those around her spiraling out of control in a deliciously chaotic series of events.

recommendations.title: Wanderlust
recommendations.overview: Rattled by sudden unemployment, a Manhattan couple surveys alternative living options, ultimately deciding to experiment with living on a rural commune where free love rules.
